description.en: The Sand Siblings arrive in Konoha for the Chūnin Exams, while the jonin instructors recommend their genin teams despite Iruka’s objections. Team 7 is tested by a disguised Iruka before officially receiving permission to enter the exams, and Sasuke is later challenged to a duel by Rock Lee.
description.sr: Braća i sestra iz Peska stižu u Konohu na Čunin ispit, dok jounin instruktori preporučuju svoje genin timove uprkos Irukinim prigovorima. Tim 7 biva testiran od strane prerušenog Iruke pre nego što zvanično dobije dozvolu za ispit, a Sasukea kasnije izaziva Rock Lee na duel.

description.en: Team 7 enters the Chūnin Exams after Kakashi wishes them luck, while Kabuto explains key competitors using his Ninja Info Cards and warns the rookies about elite genin from other villages. Tensions rise when Oto ninja attack Kabuto, but the proctor Ibiki Morino arrives, officially beginning the Chūnin Exams.
description.sr: Tim 7 ulazi u Čunin ispit nakon što im Kakashi poželi sreću, dok Kabuto objašnjava ključne učesnike koristeći svoje Ninja Info kartice i upozorava na elite genine iz drugih sela. Tenziје rastu kada Oto nindže napadnu Kabutoa, ali proktor Ibiki Morino dolazi i zvanično započinje Čunin ispit.

keywords.en: chunin exams begin kakashi team 7 kabuto ninja info cards rookies nine genin ibiki morino exam hall otogakure sound ninja introduction gaara rock lee
keywords.sr: čunin ispit početak kakashi tim 7 kabuto ninja info kartice genini ibiki morino ispit sala otogakure zvučne nindže gaara rock lee

description.en: Naruto struggles to master the Summoning Technique under Jiraiya’s training, only managing to summon a small tadpole, while tensions rise in Konoha as teams prepare for upcoming conflicts and Orochimaru’s invasion plans emerge. Meanwhile, Sakura and Ino visit Sasuke and Rock Lee in the hospital, only to find Sasuke missing and Lee pushing himself through recovery training.
description.sr: Naruto se muči da savlada tehniku prizivanja pod Jiraiyinim treninzima, uspevajući da prizove samo malog punoglavca, dok u Konohi rastu tenzije jer se timovi pripremaju za predstojeće sukobe i otkrivaju planovi Orochimaruove invazije. U međuvremenu, Sakura i Ino posećuju Sasukea i Rock Leeja u bolnici, ali otkrivaju da je Sasuke nestao, dok Lee nastavlja da se forsira tokom oporavka.

keywords.en: naruto summoning technique jiraiya training toad tadpole sakura ino sasuke missing rock lee recovery chuunin exams invasion planning konoha
keywords.sr: naruto tehnika prizivanja jiraiya trening žaba punoglavac sakura ino sasuke nestao rock lee oporavak čunin ispit invazija konoha

description.en: During Sasuke’s battle with Gaara, Gaara partially transforms into Shukaku, gaining overwhelming power and regeneration through sand. Sasuke repeatedly uses Chidori and fire techniques but fails to stop him and collapses from the strain of his cursed seal, until Naruto arrives just in time to intervene.
description.sr: Tokom Sasukove borbe sa Gaarom, Gaara se delimično pretvara u Šukakua, dobijajući ogromnu snagu i regeneraciju kroz pesak. Sasuke više puta koristi Čidori i vatrene tehnike, ali ne uspeva da ga zaustavi i pada od iscrpljenosti zbog prokletog pečata, sve dok Naruto ne stiže i interveniše u poslednjem trenutku.

keywords.en: sasuke vs gaara shukaku partial transformation chidori curse seal naruto arrives sand regeneration phoenix fire jutsu desert battle
keywords.sr: sasuke protiv gaare šukaku transformacija čidori prokleti pečat naruto stiže pesak regeneracija vatrene tehnike borba

description.en: The Akatsuki begin the extraction of the One-Tailed Shukaku from Gaara as Team Kakashi and Team Guy are dispatched to Sunagakure for backup. Meanwhile, Kankurō is critically poisoned and Chiyo confirms only Tsunade could save him, while Naruto’s team is delayed by a sandstorm before finally reaching Suna.
description.sr: Akatsuki započinje vađenje Jednorepog Šukakua iz Gaare dok Tim Kakashi i Tim Gaj bivaju poslati u Sunagakure kao podrška. U međuvremenu, Kankurō je kritično otrovan i Čiyo potvrđuje da ga samo Tsunade može spasiti, dok Narutoov tim kasni zbog peščane oluje pre nego što konačno stiže u Suna.

keywords.en: shukaku extraction gaara akatsuki ten tails statue sunagakure backup team kakashi team guy kankuro poison chiyo tsunade rescue mission sandstorm
keywords.sr: šukaku vađenje gaara akatsuki statua sunagakure tim kakashi tim gaj kankuro otrov čiyo tsunade misija spasavanja peščana oluja

description.en: Chiyo and Sakura battle Sasori, who is ultimately defeated after Chiyo sacrifices her life force to revive Sakura and coordinate a final strike. Before dying, Sasori reveals intelligence about an Akatsuki spy meeting at Tenchi Bridge. Meanwhile, Naruto and Kakashi continue their pursuit of Deidara as Kakashi reveals his Mangekyō Sharingan.
description.sr: Čiyo i Sakura se bore protiv Sasorija, koji je na kraju poražen nakon što Čiyo žrtvuje svoju životnu snagu da oživi Sakuru i zajedno izvedu završni napad. Pre smrti, Sasori otkriva informacije o sastanku Akatsuki špijuna na Tenči mostu. U međuvremenu, Naruto i Kakashi nastavljaju poteru za Deidarom dok Kakashi otkriva svoj Mangekyō Sharingan.

keywords.en: sasori vs sakura chiyo sacrifice puppet master death tenchi bridge intel akatsuki spy deidara chase mangekyo sharingan kakashi
keywords.sr: sasori protiv sakure čiyo žrtva lutkar smrt tenči most akatsuki špijun deidara potera mangekyo šaringan kakashi

description.en: Team Yamato is ambushed near the Fire Temple by powerful enemies using unique elemental techniques and terrain manipulation, while Naruto battles Fūka, a shinobi capable of using multiple chakra natures and stealing chakra through kisses. Meanwhile, Sai saves Sakura from a poisonous spider as Sora finally confronts Furido, the mastermind behind the attacks.
description.sr: Tim Yamato upada u zasedu blizu Vatrenog Hrama protiv moćnih neprijatelja koji koriste jedinstvene elementarne tehnike i manipulaciju terenom, dok se Naruto bori protiv Fūke, nindže sposobne da koristi više priroda čakre i krade čakru poljupcima. U međuvremenu, Sai spasava Sakuru od otrovnog pauka dok se Sora konačno suočava sa Furidom, organizatorom napada.

keywords.en: naruto vs fuuka fire temple ambush sai saves sakura furido sora chakra stealing kiss elemental battle
keywords.sr: naruto protiv fuuke zaseda vatreni hram sai spasava sakuru furido sora krađa čakre poljubac elementarna borba

description.en: As Konoha shinobi battle Team Guren and attempt to seal the Three-Tails, Naruto and Guren rescue Yūkimaru from Orochimaru’s forces. After Yūkimaru forgives Guren for her past actions, Kabuto reveals himself in disguise and threatens Naruto.
description.sr: Dok se Konoha nindže bore protiv Tima Guren i pokušavaju da zapečate Trorepog, Naruto i Guren spasavaju Jūkimarua od Orochimaruovih snaga. Nakon što Jūkimaru oprosti Guren za njene prošle postupke, Kabuto otkriva svoj prerušeni identitet i preti Narutu.

keywords.en: three tails sealing naruto guren yukimaru kabuto reveal team guren battle orochimaru crystal release
keywords.sr: trorepi pečaćenje naruto guren jukimaru kabuto otkrivanje tim guren borba orochimaru kristalni stil

description.en: Naruto unsuccessfully pleads with the Fourth Raikage to spare Sasuke, while the Five Kage gather to discuss the growing Akatsuki threat and the failures of the shinobi nations. After Madara Uchiha is revealed as the true leader of Akatsuki, the leaders agree to unite and form the Allied Shinobi Forces.
description.sr: Naruto bezuspešno moli Četvrtog Raikagea da poštedi Sasukea, dok se Pet Kage okupljaju kako bi razgovarali o rastućoj pretnji Akatsukija i greškama nindža nacija. Nakon što je Madara Uchiha otkriven kao pravi vođa Akatsukija, vođe pristaju da se ujedine i formiraju Savezničke Šinobi Snage.

keywords.en: five kage summit naruto begs raikage madara akatsuki leader allied shinobi forces sasuke execution order shinobi alliance
keywords.sr: pet kage samit naruto moli raikagea madara vođa akatsuki savezničke šinobi snage sasuke pogubljenje savez nindži

description.en: Sasuke abandons Konoha and joins the Sound Four in pursuit of greater power from Orochimaru, leading Naruto and the Sasuke Recovery Team to chase after him. At the Valley of the End, Naruto and Sasuke engage in a brutal final battle fueled by friendship, pain, and rival ideals, ending with Sasuke defeating Naruto and leaving for Orochimaru.
description.sr: Sasuke napušta Konohu i pridružuje se Sound Four grupi u potrazi za većom moći od Orochimarua, zbog čega Naruto i Tim za povratak Sasukea kreću za njim. U Dolini kraja, Naruto i Sasuke vode brutalnu završnu borbu vođenu prijateljstvom, bolom i sukobljenim idealima, koja se završava Sasukeovom pobedom i njegovim odlaskom kod Orochimarua.

keywords.en: naruto vs sasuke valley of the end sasuke leaves konoha final battle cursed seal nine tails rasengan chidori orochimaru
keywords.sr: naruto vs sasuke dolina kraja sasuke napušta konohu završna borba prokleti pečat devetorepi rasengan chidori orochimaru

description.en: After the battle on the bridge, Kakashi recovers at Tazuna’s house and realizes that Zabuza survived with Haku’s help. While Zabuza prepares for a rematch, Kakashi trains Team 7 in chakra control by teaching them how to walk on trees using chakra.
description.sr: Nakon borbe na mostu, Kakashi se oporavlja u Tazuninoj kući i shvata da je Zabuza preživeo uz Hakuovu pomoć. Dok se Zabuza priprema za novi sukob, Kakashi trenira Tim 7 kontroli čakre učeći ih kako da hodaju po drveću koristeći čakru.

keywords.en: kakashi chakra training tree climbing zabuza survives haku recovery team 7 training land of waves sharingan exhaustion
keywords.sr: kakashi trening čakre hodanje po drveću zabuza preživeo haku oporavak tim 7 trening zemlja talasa šaringan

description.en: At the bridge in the Land of Waves, Kakashi immobilizes Zabuza while Haku sacrifices himself to protect him from Kakashi’s Lightning Cutter, leading to his death. As Gatō arrives with mercenaries, the battle shifts again while Naruto and the others struggle with the emotional aftermath of Haku and Sasuke’s apparent death.
description.sr: Na mostu u Zemlji Talasa, Kakashi imobilizuje Zabuzu dok se Haku žrtvuje da ga zaštiti od Kakashijeve tehnike Lightning Cutter, što dovodi do njegove smrti. Kada Gatō stiže sa plaćenicima, borba se ponovo menja dok se Naruto i ostali bore sa emotivnim posledicama Hakuove i Sasukove navodne smrti.

keywords.en: land of waves bridge kakashi zabuza haku sacrifice lightning cutter gato mercenaries naruto emotional fight team 7 first arc
keywords.sr: zemlja talasa most kakashi zabuza haku žrtva lightning cutter gato plaćenici naruto emocije tim 7 prvi arc

description.en: During the Forest of Death survival battle, Naruto refuses Sasuke’s decision to surrender their scroll and fights back against a Kusa ninja using snakes. After being overwhelmed, Naruto briefly taps into the Nine-Tails’ chakra to protect Sasuke and Sakura, but is sealed and knocked unconscious before Sasuke regains resolve to fight.
description.sr: Tokom borbe za preživljavanje u Šumi smrti, Naruto odbija Sasukevu odluku da predaju svitak i suprotstavlja se Kusa nindži koji koristi zmije. Nakon što biva savladan, Naruto nakratko koristi čakru Devetorepog da zaštiti Sasukea i Sakuru, ali biva zapečaćen i onesvešćen, dok Sasuke ponovo dobija odlučnost da se bori.

keywords.en: naruto sasuke forest of death nine tails chakra curse seal anko orochimaru snake attack survival exam team 7 resolve
keywords.sr: naruto sasuke šuma smrti devetorepi čakra kletva pečat anko orochimaru zmije ispit preživljavanje tim 7

description.en: Naruto struggles against Kiba and Akamaru in their Chūnin Exams fight, as Kiba uses coordinated beast techniques and enhanced speed to overwhelm him. Despite Naruto’s shadow clone tricks and transformation tactics, Kiba ultimately defeats him with Fang Over Fang.
description.sr: Naruto se bori protiv Kibe i Akamarua u borbi Čunin ispita, dok Kiba koristi koordinisane tehnike zveri i pojačanu brzinu da ga savlada. Uprkos Narutoovim tehnikama senki i transformacijama, Kiba ga na kraju pobeđuje tehnikom Fang Over Fang.

keywords.en: naruto vs kiba akamaru chunin exams fang over fang shadow clone transformation inuzuka clan fight
keywords.sr: naruto kiba akamaru čunin ispit fang over fang senka klon transformacija inuzuka borba

description.en: Gaara disappears before the Chūnin Exams finals and is later stopped by Naruto and Shikamaru when he attempts to kill Rock Lee in the hospital. Under Shikamaru’s Shadow Possession Technique, Gaara reveals his tragic past as the host of Shukaku before retreating and vowing revenge.
description.sr: Gaara nestaje pre finala Čunin ispita i kasnije ga Naruto i Šikamaru zaustavljaju kada pokuša da ubije Rock Leeja u bolnici. Pod Šikamaruovom tehnikom senke, Gaara otkriva svoju tragičnu prošlost kao domaćin Šukakua pre nego što se povlači i obećava osvetu.

keywords.en: gaara attack lee hospital shukaku jinchuriki revelation shikamaru shadow possession naruto intervention chunin exams gaara backstory revenge
keywords.sr: gaara napad lee bolnica shukaku džinčuriki šikamaru senka naruto intervencija čunin ispit osveta gaara prošlost

description.en: Naruto returns to Konoha and reunites with Kakashi and Sakura, only to face a new bell test that shows how much Team 7 has grown since their original training. Meanwhile, the Akatsuki begin moving against Sunagakure as Sasori and Deidara secretly infiltrate the village with help from a hidden spy.
description.sr: Наруто се враћа у Коноху и поново се удружује са Какашијем и Сакуром, само да би се суочио са новим тестом звона који показује колико је Тим 7 порастао од њиховог првобитног тренинга. У међувремену, Акацуки почиње да се креће против Сунагакуреа док се Сасори и Деидара тајно инфилтрирају у село уз помоћ скривеног шпијуна.

keywords.en: naruto return konoha reunion sakura kakashi timeskip training jiraiya
keywords.sr: naruto povratak konoha susret sakura kakashi trening

description.en: Team Kakashi and Team Guy defeat the fake bodies used by Itachi and Kisame, while Naruto unveils his new Big Ball Rasengan.
description.sr: Tim Kakashi i Tim Gaj pobeđuju lažna tela koja su koristili Itachi i Kisame, dok Naruto otkriva svoj novi Veliki Rasengan (Big Ball Rasengan).

keywords.en: Team Kakashi and Team Guy defeat the fake bodies used by Itachi and Kisame
keywords.sr: Tim Kakashi i Tim Gaj protiv Itachija i Kisamea

description.en: After Kakashi ends up hospitalized from overusing his Mangekyō Sharingan against Deidara, Naruto and Sakura learn about Sasori’s tip regarding Orochimaru’s spy at Tenchi Bridge and begin preparing a new mission to find Sasuke. While searching for a replacement teammate, Naruto runs into Konoha’s rookies in a series of chaotic encounters before finally meeting Sai, a strange Root ninja who attacks him using living ink beasts.
description.sr: Naruto i Sakura, nakon što Kakashi završi u bolnici zbog preteranog korišćenja Mangekyō Sharingana u borbi protiv Deidare, saznaju za Sasorijevu informaciju o Orochimaruovom špijunu na Tenči mostu i počinju da se pripremaju za novu misiju u potrazi za Sasukem. Dok Naruto traži zamenskog člana tima, nailazi na Konoha novajlije u nizu haotičnih susreta, pre nego što konačno upoznaje Saija, čudnog nindžu iz Root-a koji ga napada živim ink čudovištima.

description.en: Naruto successfully develops and uses his Wind Release: Rasenshuriken to defeat Kakuzu after a coordinated battle involving Kakashi, Yamato, and shadow clones. Meanwhile, Shikamaru defeats Hidan through strategy and revenge for Asuma, showcasing how both members of Akatsuki are ultimately taken down by Team 10 and allies.
description.sr: Naruto uspešno koristi svoj Vetar stil: Rasenshuriken u koordinisanoj borbi kako bi konačno porazio Kakuzua, dok Šikamaru osvećuje Asumu tako što pobeđuje Hidana kroz strategiju i odlučnost. Tim 7 i Tim 10 obezbeđuju pobedu protiv dva člana Akatsukija.

keywords.en: Naruto Rasenshuriken vs Kakuzu Hidan defeat
keywords.sr: Naruto Rasenshuriken vs Kakuzu Hidan defeat

description.en: Kakashi finally abandons the mission rules to help Obito save Rin, but during the escape Obito awakens his Sharingan and sacrifices himself to save Kakashi from being crushed by a boulder. Before dying, Obito gives Kakashi his Sharingan as a gift, leading Kakashi to defeat the Iwa ninja and later become known as “Kakashi of the Sharingan.”
description.sr: Kakashi konačno napušta pravila misije kako bi pomogao Obitu da spase Rin, ali tokom bekstva Obito budi svoj Sharingan i žrtvuje se da bi spasao Kakashija od zgnječenja stenom. Pre nego što umre, Obito daje Kakashiju svoj Sharingan kao poklon, što omogućava Kakashiju da pobedi Iwa nindže i kasnije postane poznat kao “Kakashi sa Sharinganom”.

keywords.en: obito kakashi sharingan
keywords.sr: obito kakashi sharingan
